case_title: HORNBLOWER YACHTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. UGANDAN NORTH AMERICAN ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORNBLOWER YACHTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UGANDAN NORTH AMERICAN ASSOCIATION $7,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,092.71 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,972.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
